double_tap.name: Double Tap
double_tap.description: Setup/Builder: Two quick shots to the center mass. Generates 15 Stamina and 1 Ammo Pip.

hollow_point.name: Hollow Point
hollow_point.description: Setup: Load specialized rounds. Generates 1 Ammo Pip and applies [Bleeding].

gunner_headshot.name: Headshot
gunner_headshot.description: Payoff: A perfect, lethal shot. Consumes 5 Ammo Pips to deal Physical damage with a massive critical multiplier.

buckshot.name: Buckshot
buckshot.description: Payoff/AOE: A spray of lead. Consumes 3 Ammo Pips to deal AOE Physical damage in the room.

covering_fire.name: Covering Fire
covering_fire.description: Defense: Suppress the enemy with lead. All enemies in the room deal 30% less damage for 4 ticks.

flashbang.name: Flashbang
flashbang.description: Defense/Disruption: Blind and deafen. Applies [Blinded] and [Dazed] for 2 ticks.

tactical_slide.name: Tactical Slide
tactical_slide.description: Mobility: Slide into cover, breaking all movement-restricting effects.

rapid_fire.name: Rapid Fire
rapid_fire.description: Utility/Signature: For 10 ticks, your attacks have 0 cooldown and double Attack Speed.

gunner_physiology.name: Gunner Physiology
gunner_physiology.description: Passive: Ballistic Specialist. You gain 10% increased attack speed and your critical strikes restore 1 Ammo Pip.
